{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/69960711?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/EchoSkorJjj", "id": 69960711, "login": "EchoSkorJjj", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY5OTYwNzEx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/EchoSkorJjj", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48795", "cvss": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "### Summary

The fix for [GHSA-f5x2-vj4h-vg4c](https://github.com/adonisjs/core/security/advisories/GHSA-f5x2-vj4h-vg4c) / CVE-2026-25754 introduced in commit [`40e1c71`](https://github.com/adonisjs/bodyparser/commit/40e1c71f958cffb74f6b91bed6630dca979062ed) is incomplete and can be bypassed through nested prototype pollution payloads.

The original patch replaced the internal `FormFields` storage object with `Object.create(null)`, preventing direct payloads such as `__proto__.polluted`. However, payloads containing a non-dangerous segment before `__proto__` or `constructor.prototype`, such as `user.__proto__.polluted`, still lead to `Object.prototype` pollution.

This issue is exploitable remotely through a single unauthenticated `multipart/form-data` request using the default configuration.

### Affected versions

- `>= 10.1.3 < 10.1.5`
- `>= 11.0.0-next.9 < 11.0.3`

### Details

The regression tests added by the original fix only covered direct payloads such as:

- `__proto__.polluted`
- `constructor.prototype.polluted`

These payloads are blocked because the root object no longer inherits from `Object.prototype`.

However, lodash `_.set()` (via `@poppinss/utils`) still creates intermediate objects using plain `{}` values. Once a normal segment is encountered, subsequent `__proto__` or `constructor.prototype` segments regain access to `Object.prototype`.

### Impact

An unauthenticated attacker can remotely pollute `Object.prototype` on any route accepting multipart/form-data requests behind `BodyParserMiddleware`.

Because the pollution is process-wide, the impact may include authorization bypasses, unexpected behavior in downstream libraries, or prototype pollution gadget chains leading to remote code execution.

### Patches

Fixes targeting v6 and v7 have been published below.

Users should upgrade to a version that includes the following fix:

- https://github.com/adonisjs/bodyparser/releases/tag/v10.1.5
- https://github.com/adonisjs/bodyparser/releases/tag/v11.0.3

### References

- [CWE-1321](https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/1321.html)
- Prior advisory this bypasses: [GHSA-f5x2-vj4h-vg4c](https://github.com/adonisjs/core/security/advisories/GHSA-f5x2-vj4h-vg4c) / CVE-2026-25754", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0054, "percentile": 0.4176}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T18:34:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48795"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-30T18:34:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/adonisjs/core/security/advisories/GHSA-f5x2-vj4h-vg4c", "https://github.com/adonisjs/core/security/advisories/GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h", "https://github.com/adonisjs/bodyparser/commit/40e1c71f958cffb74f6b91bed6630dca979062ed", "https://github.com/adonisjs/bodyparser/releases/tag/v10.1.5", "https://github.com/adonisjs/bodyparser/releases/tag/v11.0.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/adonisjs/core/security-advisories/GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/adonisjs/core", "summary": "@adonisjs/bodyparser has an incomplete fix for CVE-2026-25754", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T18:34:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcm7-3vpr-hj5h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.1.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@adonisjs/bodyparser"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 10.1.3, <= 10.1.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "11.0.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@adonisjs/bodyparser"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.0-next.9, <= 11.0.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @adonisjs/bodyparser has an incomplete fix for CVE-2026-25754
